title: prismMeta
description: Prism metadata for a single contract-card artifact: provenance, dependencies, and validation state.

prismId.description: Stable identifier for this prism artifact (often == contract-card id).

schemaVersion.description: Version of the prismMeta schema (e.g., prismMeta.v1).

sessionId.description: Opaque session or conversation id for this generation step.

agentId.description: Logical id of the AI/chat agent or tool that produced this file.

agentProfileId.description: Reference to an agentProfile card defining rights (e.g., clamp permission).

targetRepo.description: Repository this artifact is intended for (org/repo or git URI).

path.description: Path within the target repo where this file should live.

hash.description: Content hash of this file (e.g., sha256:<hex>).

dependencies.description: Upstream contracts and proofs this file depends on.

id.description: Upstream contract id (e.g., regionContractCard id, policyEnvelope id, proofEnvelope id).

kind.description: Type of dependency (e.g., policy, region, seed, proof, style).

repo.description: Optional: repository where the dependency lives.

path.description: Optional: file path of the dependency.

validation.description: Result of last validation run at generation time.

schemaValidated.description: True if JSON Schema validation passed.

subsetValidated.description: True if invariant/metric subset rules passed.

ledgerValidated.description: True if deadledgerref and related proofs resolved and validated.

clamped.description: True if any values were clamped during validation.

clampReasons.description: Optional list of clamp reasons (per field/metric).

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the validation pass that produced this metadata.

publicKeyRef.description: Opaque reference to the public key (e.g., Dead-Ledger verifier id).

proofEnvelopeId.description: Optional: id of a zkpproof envelope that attests this delta.
